title: RENT ASSISTANCE FOR FAMILIES WITH CHILDREN - 211info
text: IRCO PACIFIC ISLANDER AND ASIAN FAMILY CENTER RENT ASSISTANCE FOR FAMILIES WITH CHILDREN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent assistance, rental deposit assistance, and rent application fee assistance along with housing case management services. Assistance is limited and not guaranteed and on a first come, first serve basis. Only the first 40 callers will receive callbacks. Rent assistance is limited to 2 months. 8040 NE Sandy Boulevard Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Familes with children under age 18 who are currently housed and an income level at or below 50% of Area Median Income (AMI) with an imminent risk of homelessness. Priority is given to SUN school families who identify as Asian Pacific Islanders or African Immigrants. Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 234-2048 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Rent Hotline (503) 234-2048 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule appointment. When line is open, leave a message with first name, last name, and phone number. Calls are returned on a first-come, first-served basis. No walk-ins accepted. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID for adults, Social Security cards, and proof of income for the past 30 days for all adults LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Arabic, Burmese, Dari, Farsi, Hindi, Hmong, Karen, Nepali, Pashto, Urdu, Vietnamese AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 12 and 72 Services: Rent Payment Assistance * Families with Children Rental Application Fee Payment Assistance * Families with Children Rental Deposit Assistance * Families with Children Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH ACADEMIC SUPPORT AND PARENT ENGAGEMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH NAVIGATION HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY RENTAL ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ASIAN AND PACIFIC ISLANDER DEVELOPMENT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S PROGRAMS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SERVICES AGAINST EXPLOITATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH MENTORING LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - GANG PREVENTION AND INTERVENTION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - FAMILY PROGRAMS UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IRCO PACIFIC ISLANDER AND ASIAN FAMILY CENTER
